title: Mildly Peppery Norwegian Seed Tagine
description: A light and festive Norwegian dish featuring seeds, cooked in a tagine style and served in an earthenware bowl, perfect for a paleo-friendly dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large earthenware bowl, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the pumpkin seeds, sunflower seeds, black pepper, and salt, and stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring to a simmer.
Cover the bowl with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Cook for 30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the seeds are tender.
Remove from the oven and stir in the chopped parsley.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
